name: HK Green Mini Bus Arrival
description: Real-time GMB (Green Mini Bus) arrival information for Hong Kong using the official Transport Department API.
author: Joey (OpenClaw Agent) - Built 2025-03-25

security.notes: Data sourced from official HK government APIs. Cache stored locally in skill directory. No credential storage. All inputs sanitized before use.

tools.name: searchRoutes
tools.description: Search for GMB route numbers. Returns matching regions and optionally suggestions if not found.

tools.name: getGMBArrival
tools.description: Get the next 3 arrival times for a GMB route at a specific stop. Requires route number, direction (1 or 2), stop name (English or Chinese), and region (HKI/KLN/NT).

direction.description: Direction sequence: "1" for terminus A → B, "2" for B → A

stopName.description: Stop name (partial or full, English or Chinese)

region.description: Region code: "HKI" (Hong Kong Island), "KLN" (Kowloon), or "NT" (New Territories)
